docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,137.60 FILED BY CHEN, NUO QIANG LIU, YUJING AS TO DEFENDANT GIOVANNI, RADAVERO KIMBERLY ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR APR-18-2008 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF APR-18-2008 - CONTINUED TO MAY-28-2008 AT 8:30 AM IN DEPT. 506. ALL PARTIES PRESENT, HOWEVER THE DEFENDANT DOES NOT STIPULATE TO HAVING A JUDGE PRO TEM HEARING THE CASE - CONTINUED FOR COMMISSIONER SLAVIT TO HEAR CASE. PLAINTIFF TO FILE PROOF OF SERVICE WITH THE COURT. JUDGE PRO TEM: DANIEL DEAN. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506).
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED BY PLAINTIFF IS "DEFECTIVE". (SERVICE FEE $100.00)

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAY-28-2008 - CONTINUED TO JUL-22-2008 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT. 506. BOTH PARTIES ARE PRESENT, HOWEVER THE PLAINTIFF'S SERVICE ON DEFENDANT IS DEFECTIVE PER THE MAY 27, 2008 IJS ENTRY. DEFENDANT DOES NOT WAIVE SERVICE. COMMISSIONER PAUL SLAVIT. CLERK: S. VANTREEE. NOT REPORTED. (506).
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL FILED BY PLAINTIFF CHEN, NUO QIANG LIU, YUJING AS TO DEFENDANT GIOVANNI, RADAVERO KIMBERLY
COPYING FEES

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JUL-22-2008 - CONTINUED PER STIPULATION OF ALL PARTIES TO SEP-02-2008 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT. 506. BOTH PARTIES ARE PRESENT, DEFENDANT WAIVED SERVICE ON PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM, HOWEVER DEFENDANT DOES NOT STIPULATE TO A JUDGE PRO TEM HEARING THE CASE. CONTINUED FOR COMMISSIONER SLAVIT TO HEAR THE CASE. JUDGE PRO TEM: DAVID LAVINE. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506).
REQUEST TO POSTPONE SMALL CLAIMS HEARING FILED LESS THAN 10 DAYS. FILED BY PLAINTIFF CHEN, NUO QIANG
CERTIFIED MAIL RETURNED UNCLAIMED. SENT TO DEFT.
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF SEP-02-2008 IS OFF CALENDAR, NO APPEARANCE(S). NO APPEARANCE BY EITHER PARTY. COMMISSIONER PAUL SLAVIT. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506).
PER COMMISSIONER, LATE REQUEST FOR CONTINUANCE WILL BE HEARD AND DECIDED ON DATE OF HEARING.
TRIAL RESET TO OCT-30-2008 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL FILED BY PLAINTIFF CHEN, NUO QIANG AS TO DEFENDANT GIOVANNI, RADAVERO KIMBERLY

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF OCT-30-2008 - CONTINUED FOR PROOF OF SERVICE PER REQUEST OF PLAINTIFF TO DEC-29-2008 AT 3:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. PLAINTIFF PRESENT. DEFENDANT NOT PRESENT. JUDGE PRO TEM: DAVID LAVINE. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506).
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF COURT CERTIFIED MAIL RETURNED UNSERVED AS TO DEFENDANT GIOVANNI, RADAVERO KIMBERLY

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF DEC-29-2008 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF DEC-29-2008 BY PAUL SLAVIT. APPEARANCES BY BOTH PARTIES. EXHIBITS RETAINED. DEFENDANT WAIVES SERVICE ON PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506).
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF DEC-29-2008 - JUDGMENT.

PARTIES WAIVE SERVICE ON PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM. THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF CHEN, NUO QIANG LIU, YUJING RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT GIOVANNI, RADAVERO KIMBERLY $1,068.80 PRINCIPAL, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,068.80, THE COURT DETERMINES PLAINTIFF'S DAMAGES TO BE $2137.60 AND ATTRIBUTES 50% COMPARITIVE FAULT TO PLAINTIFF. THE JUDGMENT IS A NET AWARD. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S AND DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT
EXHIBITS FROM EXHIBIT REPORT DATED APR-01-2009 ORDERED DESTROYED
